data.acceptance:
1. Overview column width is capped at one sixth of the visible overview scrollport width.
2. Each overview tab tracks a per-tab sizing watermark so columns do not immediately grow when visible state columns become empty.
3. When a tab sees more visible columns than its current watermark, the new watermark sizes as if two additional columns were present.
4. Switching tabs uses each tab's own watermark rather than sharing sizing pressure across tabs.
5. Tests cover the one-sixth cap, two-column pressure rule, and no-grow behavior after visible column counts decrease.
6. Existing overview tab grouping, hidden-empty-column behavior, and beat tile metadata remain intact.
